title: narcissus major var. maximus
intro: Narcissus major var. maximus, also known as the Large-flowered Daffodil or Tazetta, is a variety of flowering bulbous perennial plant belonging to the Narcissus genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Narcissus major var. maximus include reducing anxiety and stress, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
